title: Latent Reconstruction Forward Pass
interaction_flow: --- PRE-PROCESSING (before forward) ---
Caller → get_plucker_embedding_and_rays(intrinsics, c2ws, img_size, patch_size_out_factor, flip_flag)
get_plucker_embedding_and_rays → ray_condition(intrinsics, c2ws, H, W, flip_flag) → plucker_embedding [B,T,6,H,W], rays_os [B,T,3,H,W], rays_ds [B,T,3,H,W]
get_plucker_embedding_and_rays → ray_condition(intrinsics_resized, c2ws, H//factor, W//factor) → rays_os_patch, rays_ds_patch [if patch_size_out_factor != 1]
get_plucker_embedding_and_rays → Caller: return plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds
--- FORWARD PASS ---
Caller → LatentRecon.forward(data) [data keys: rays_os, rays_ds, plucker_embedding, images_input_embed, time_embeddings, cam_view, intrinsics, num_input_multi_views]
LatentRecon.forward → LatentRecon.forward_gaussians(images, plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds, time_embeddings, num_input_multi_views)
forward_gaussians → reshape_mv_temp_to_batch(images, plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds) [rearrange 'b (v t) c h w -> (b v) t c h w']
forward_gaussians → PatchEmbed3D.patch_embed(images_input) → x [B*V, T*h*w, enc_embed_dim]
forward_gaussians → LatentRecon.get_time_embedding(time_embeddings, V) → x_time_emb, x_time_emb_tgt; x = x + x_time_emb + x_time_emb_tgt [if time_embedding]
forward_gaussians → PatchEmbed3D.patch_plucker_embed(plucker_embedding) → plucker_tokens; x = x + plucker_tokens [if use_plucker]
forward_gaussians → reshape_mv_batch_to_temp(x) [merge multi-views into T dim for joint attention, if process_multi_views]
forward_gaussians → pos_embedding(x) → x [if use_pos_embedding]
forward_gaussians → enc_blocks[i](x) for each block → x [Transformer/Mamba attention blocks with gradient checkpointing]
forward_gaussians → enc_norm(x) → x [LayerNorm]
forward_gaussians → block_out(x) → x [optional Linear channel reduction]
forward_gaussians → reshape_mv_temp_to_batch(x) [restore batch dim if process_multi_views]
forward_gaussians → rearrange x: '(b*v) (t h w) c -> (b*v) c t h w'
forward_gaussians → deconv(x) → x [ConvTranspose3d upsample to output resolution, shape (b*v, output_dims, T_out, H_out, W_out)]
forward_gaussians → split x_mask = x[:, [-1]] if sub_sample_gaussians_type == 'learned'
forward_gaussians → subsample_x_and_rays_wrapper(x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask) → x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask [if sub_sample_gaussians]
subsample_x_and_rays_wrapper → subsample_x_and_rays(x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask, factor, type, type_tokens, temperature, training)
[type='random'] subsample_x_and_rays → subsample_pixels_spatio_temporal([B,T,H,W], [t_out,h_out,w_out]) → b_idx,t_idx,h_idx,w_idx
subsample_x_and_rays → query_z_with_indices(indices, x/rays_os/rays_ds) → subsampled tensors [B, N_sub, C]
[type='learned'] subsample_x_and_rays → process_tensors(tokens=x, mask_logits=x_mask, other_tensors=[rays_os,rays_ds], k_t, k_hw, temperature, training) → x, rays, x_mask
forward_gaussians → gaussian_processing(x, rays_os, rays_ds) → gaussians [B*V, N, 14]
gaussian_processing: split x → distance(1), rgb(3), scaling(3), rotation(4), opacity(1)
gaussian_processing: depth = dnear*(1-sigmoid(distance)) + dfar*sigmoid(distance)
gaussian_processing: pos = rays_os + rays_ds * depth
gaussian_processing: apply activations → opacity=sigmoid(x-2), scale=exp(x-shift).clamp(cap), rotation=normalize, rgb=0.5*tanh(x)+0.5
gaussian_processing: cat([pos, opacity, scale, rotation, rgb]) → gaussians [B*V, N, 14]
forward_gaussians → reshape_mv_batch_to_temp(gaussians) [fuse multi-views: '(b v) d c -> b (v d) c']
forward_gaussians → gaussian_pruning(gaussians) → gaussians [prune by opacity: keep top-k + random fraction]
gaussian_pruning: argsort opacity descending, keep num_keep + num_keep_random indices via gather
forward_gaussians → LatentRecon.forward: return gaussians [B, N_pruned, 14], x_mask
LatentRecon.forward → GaussianRenderer.gs.render(gaussians, cam_view, bg_color=[1,1,1], intrinsics) → results
gs.render: loop over B batches and V views in chunks
gs.render → rasterization(means3D, quats=rotations, scales, opacities, colors=rgbs, viewmats, Ks, width, height, near_plane, far_plane, render_mode='RGB+ED') → rendered_image_all, rendered_alpha_all
gs.render → LatentRecon.forward: return results {images_pred [B,V,3,H,W], depths_pred [B,V,1,H,W]}
LatentRecon.forward → Caller: return out {images_pred, depths_pred, opacity_pred} [training] or {images_pred, depths_pred, gaussians, gaussians_mask_pred} [inference]
--- LOSS COMPUTATION (training only) ---
Caller → compute_loss(accelerator, train_loss, pred_images, gt_images, pred_depths, gt_depths, pred_opacity, config, lpips_loss_module)
compute_loss: loss = MSE(pred_images, gt_images)
compute_loss → compute_lpips_loss_in_chunks(lpips_module, gt, pred) → loss_lpips [if lambda_lpips > 0]
compute_loss → fused_ssim(pred, gt) → loss_ssim [if lambda_ssim > 0]
compute_loss → compute_depth_loss(pred_depths, gt_depths) → normalize_depth → smooth_l1_loss [if lambda_depth > 0]
compute_loss: loss_opacity = pred_opacity.sigmoid().mean() [if lambda_opacity > 0]
compute_loss: total loss = MSE + lambda_lpips*LPIPS + lambda_ssim*SSIM + lambda_depth*depth + lambda_opacity*opacity
compute_loss → accelerator.gather(loss) → avg_loss [distributed training]
compute_loss → Caller: return train_loss, loss
key_relationships: LatentRecon composes GaussianRenderer (self.gs = GaussianRenderer or GaussianRendererDeferred)
LatentRecon composes PatchEmbed3D (patch_embed, patch_plucker_embed, patch_time_embed, patch_time_embed_tgt)
LatentRecon composes enc_blocks (Transformer/Mamba attention layers via get_model_blocks)
LatentRecon composes deconv (ConvTranspose3dFactorized | ConvTranspose3dReduced | MultiStageConvTranspose3d | nn.ConvTranspose3d)
LatentRecon depends_on subsample_x_and_rays (from render.py) via subsample_x_and_rays_wrapper
subsample_x_and_rays depends_on process_tensors (learned pruning path, from token_pruning module)
compute_loss depends_on compute_depth_loss, normalize_depth, compute_lpips_loss_in_chunks, fused_ssim

data_shapes.images_input_embed: [B, V*T, C, H, W] (latent video frames)
data_shapes.gaussians: [B, N_pruned, 14] — layout: pos(3), opacity(1), scale(3), rotation(4), rgb(3)

important_notes: Two rendering backends: GaussianRenderer (standard) and GaussianRendererDeferred (deferred backprop) selected by opt.deferred_bp
Token pruning has two strategies: 'random' (uniform random spatial subsampling) and 'learned' (Gumbel-Softmax differentiable top-k with 'local' per-frame or 'global' joint selection)
gaussian_pruning follows Long LRM: rank by opacity, keep top-(1-prune_ratio) + small random fraction

Gaussian attributes: distance→depth via sigmoid interpolation between dnear/dfar, optional position offsets, activations: opacity=sigmoid(x-2), scale=exp clamp, rotation=L2 normalize, rgb=0.5*tanh+0.5
Multi-view inputs are handled by reshaping between batch and temporal dimensions (reshape_mv_temp_to_batch / reshape_mv_batch_to_temp)
Plucker embeddings encoded at full image resolution; rays for Gaussian positions encoded at subsampled patch resolution (patch_size_out_factor)
All heavy operations use gradient checkpointing (forward_checkpointing) when opt.gradient_checkpoint_* is set
Loss is composed: MSE (always) + LPIPS (lambda_lpips) + SSIM (lambda_ssim) + SmoothL1 depth (lambda_depth) + opacity regularization (lambda_opacity)
